name: tinypic-image-compressor

scripts.check: node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --experimental-default-type=module --check src/code.js && node --experimental-default-type=module --check src/main.js && node --experimental-default-type=module --check src/i18n.js && node --experimental-default-type=module --check src/raster-export-worker.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:ui

author: 23di
description: Compress and export PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG, and PDF assets locally from Figma
